title: Ravi's Family Hugs
synopsis: Baby Ravi counts from one to five as he receives warm hugs from each member of his loving family, creating a soothing bedtime routine filled with joy and connection.

illustration.description: Baby Ravi with dark hair and brown skin sits on a soft cream rug, arms outstretched toward his mama who wears a flowing lavender sari. Mama has long black hair and warm brown eyes, smiling as she leans down. The background shows a cozy living room with pale yellow walls and soft morning light streaming through gauzy curtains.
illustration.alt: Mama in lavender sari giving Ravi his first hug

illustration.description: Papa with a neat beard and warm brown skin lifts Ravi up high, both giggling. Papa wears a soft mint green kurta and has kind eyes behind wire-rimmed glasses. The setting is the same cozy room, now with gentle afternoon light casting soft shadows on the pale wooden floors.
illustration.alt: Papa in mint green kurta giving Ravi his second hug

illustration.description: Grandmother Nani sits cross-legged on a plush coral cushion, her silver-streaked hair in a neat bun, wearing a soft peach shawl. She holds Ravi close while he nestles against her chest. Her weathered hands are gentle, and her eyes crinkle with love. The background shows warm terracotta walls with simple brass decorations.
illustration.alt: Nani in peach shawl giving Ravi his third hug

illustration.description: Ravi's older sister Didi, about age 4 with two neat braids tied with yellow ribbons, wears a soft pink dress with tiny flower prints. She hugs Ravi while both sit on a thick sage green blanket spread on the floor. Her expression is protective and loving, with bright brown eyes and a gap-toothed smile.
illustration.alt: Sister Didi in pink dress giving Ravi his fourth hug

illustration.description: A small golden-brown puppy with floppy ears and a pink tongue licks Ravi's cheek while he laughs with pure joy. Ravi sits on soft grass in their backyard garden, surrounded by gentle marigolds and jasmine flowers. The late afternoon sun creates a warm golden glow over the peaceful scene.
illustration.alt: Golden puppy giving Ravi his fifth hug with licks

illustration.description: The entire family gathers around Ravi in the center - Mama, Papa, Nani, and Didi all lean in for one big embrace while the puppy sits nearby wagging its tail. Everyone's faces show pure happiness and love. The setting is their living room with soft evening light and warm amber tones throughout.
illustration.alt: Whole family giving Ravi a group hug together

illustration.description: Ravi sleeps peacefully in a small wooden crib with soft white bedding, clutching a small stuffed elephant. Mama sits beside him, her hand gently resting on his back. The room is dimly lit with a soft nightlight casting gentle stars on the pale blue walls. Everything feels calm and safe.
illustration.alt: Ravi sleeping peacefully after all his family hugs

metadata.illustrationStyle: Soft, rounded shapes with warm pastel colors. Gentle watercolor feel. Large, friendly faces. High contrast for baby eyes. Simple backgrounds.

questions.question: Who gave Ravi the first hug?
questions.explanation: Mama gave Ravi his first hug with a sweet 'Mmm-mah!' sound.

questions.question: What sound did the puppy make?
questions.explanation: The puppy said 'Woof-woof!' when giving Ravi his fifth hug.

questions.question: How many total hugs did Ravi get?
questions.explanation: Ravi counted five hugs from Mama, Papa, Nani, Didi, and puppy.
